birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Eight specimens were collected from the upper Río Shinipo and Río Tzipani valleys , and a further two at Quebrada Quirapokiari in July 2011. Its range is sympatric and syntopic with that of the gilded barbet, and coincides with the boundary and sections of the Sira Communal Reserve. It primarily inhabits the highest stratum of tall (up to ) montane forest with arboreal epiphytes and moss above a sparsely vegetated understory

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Cerros del Sira in central Peru
